title: Hiring Store Manager at Amazon Books India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Amazon Books India
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
